title: gonystylus macrophyllus
intro: Gonystylus macrophyllus, also known as the Royal Mahogany tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gonystylus macrophyllus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Gonystylus macrophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
